title: 151 Smooth All Purpose Filler - Interior & Exterior Use | No Sagging, Shrinking or Cracking - Easy To Use Ready Mixed Paste | Repairs for Plaster, Plasterboard, Brick, Wood and Stone (White, 600g)
features: READY TO USE: 151 All Purpose Filler, ready mixed, no shrinkage, sagging or cracking after use. Ideal for indoor and outdoor repairs.
WHITE & SMOOTH FINISH: 151 All Purpose Filler, sand down plaster, plasterboard, brick wood or stone. Remove dust and debris and fill with 151 All Purpose Filler, it will dry white and smooth.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: 151 All Purpose Filler, suitable for a wide range of indoor and outdoor repairs. Always ensure area is clean and dry before applying. Sand after filler is dry if required.
CRACKS, GAPS & HOLES: 151 All Purpose Filler, use around the home indoors and out to repair cracks, fill holes and gaps.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Multi purpose, 600g ready mixed, all purose filler. Store at room temperature
